channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BGPL] String Metaverse: Promoter Group Sells 3.27% Stake via OFS
item.description:
String Metaverse Ltd's promoter group sold 38,10,000 equity shares, representing 3.27% of the company's total issued and paid-up equity share capital, through an Offer for Sale (OFS) mechanism. The OFS was conducted on April 21-22, 2026, to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements. Y. Venkata Subba Rao, a member of the promoter group, divested 5,00,000 shares (0.43%) through the OFS. Post-sale, Y. Venkata Subba Rao holds 3,40,000 shares, representing 0.29% of the equity.

  • String Metaverse promoter group sold 3.27% stake via OFS.
  • OFS aimed to meet Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) norms.
  • Y. Venkata Subba Rao sold 5,00,000 shares (0.43%) through OFS.
  • Y. Venkata Subba Rao's holding reduced to 0.29% post-sale.
  • The OFS took place on April 21 and April 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bio Green Papers Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital: Poshika Fin Acquired 13.79 Lakh Shares (0.89%)
item.description:
Poshika Financial Ecosystem Pvt Ltd, a promoter-group entity of Ugro Capital, acquired 13,79,374 equity shares (0.89%) of Ugro Capital through open market purchases on April 23 and 24, 2026. The shares were acquired at an average price of ₹110.94 and ₹107.65 per share, respectively. This acquisition, combined with a previous purchase, brings the cumulative shareholding to 18,54,374 shares, representing 1.20% of the total paid-up equity share capital. The acquisition does not trigger mandatory disclosure obligations but is being voluntarily disclosed for transparency.

  • Poshika Financial Ecosystem acquired 13.79 lakh Ugro Capital shares.
  • Acquisition represents 0.89% of Ugro Capital's equity share capital.
  • Shares purchased on April 23 & 24, 2026, at ₹110.94 & ₹107.65 average price.
  • Cumulative holding after prior purchase is 1.20% of equity share capital.
  • Disclosure is voluntary, as it doesn't trigger mandatory obligations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [JDCABLES] JD Cables FY26 Revenue Up 45% YoY to ₹36,459.15 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

JD Cables Ltd reported a 45.53% YoY increase in revenue for FY26, reaching ₹36,459.15 Cr compared to ₹25,052.58 Cr in FY25. Q4 FY26 revenue rose by 51.97% to ₹12,349.11 Cr. The company is expanding capacity with a new facility at Dankuni, investing ₹10.45 Cr and ₹7.23 Cr in plant and machinery to add new product lines. JD Cables anticipates continued growth driven by a strong order book and increasing participation in EPC infrastructure projects, evolving into an integrated EPC-led infrastructure player.

  • JD Cables' FY26 revenue increased by 45.53% YoY to ₹36,459.15 Cr.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue grew by 51.97% to ₹12,349.11 Cr.
  • Order book stands at approximately ₹515 Cr as of March 2026.
  • Capacity utilization for Unit I is 82.43% and Unit II is 84.56%.
  • Company is expanding capacity at Dankuni with ₹17.68 Cr investment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JD Cables Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [SHREESEC] Shree Securities to Delist from Calcutta Stock Exchange
item.description:
Shree Securities Ltd's board approved the voluntary delisting of its equity shares from the Calcutta Stock Exchange Limited, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The company's shares will continue to be listed on BSE Limited, a stock exchange with a nationwide trading terminal. Consequently, no exit opportunity will be provided to the shareholders as per SEBI Delisting Regulations. The board meeting, where this decision was made, commenced at 11:00 AM and concluded at 12:00 PM.

  • Shree Securities to delist from Calcutta Stock Exchange.
  • Delisting is compliant with SEBI regulations.
  • Shares remain listed on BSE Limited.
  • No exit opportunity for shareholders due to continued BSE listing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shree Securities Ltd | Category: Delisting

item.title: [CRANEX] Cranex: Chaitanya Agrawal's Shareholding Increased to 8.98%
item.description:
Cranex Ltd. has received disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for Chaitanya Agrawal. This relates to the allotment of equity shares upon conversion of convertible warrants. Post-acquisition, Chaitanya Agrawal's shareholding increased to 8.98%, with total diluted share/voting capital of the company after acquisition being ₹8,78,00,000/- (87,80,000 Equity Shares of ₹10/- each).

  • Chaitanya Agrawal's shareholding in Cranex Ltd. increased to 8.98% post-acquisition.
  • The acquisition is due to the conversion of convertible warrants into equity shares.
  • 7,00,000 Equity Shares were allotted at ₹102/- each upon warrant conversion.
  • Total diluted share/voting capital after acquisition is ₹8,78,00,000/-.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI's Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CRANEX LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [BDL] BDL Achieves Milestone in Indigenous Torpedo Production
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bharat Dynamics Ltd (BDL) has achieved a major milestone in indigenous defence manufacturing with the production and delivery of a Wire Guided Heavy Weight Torpedo (WGHWT) to NSTL on April 23, 2026. BDL partnered with NSTL as the Development-cum-Production Partner (DcPP) in realizing India’s first indigenous production grade Wire Guided Heavy Weight Torpedo. The torpedo, in both practice and combat configurations, features advanced homing, propulsion, search, attack, and re-attack capabilities, enhancing the Indian Navy’s operational capabilities. This achievement aligns with the Government of India’s Aatmanirbhar Bharat initiative.

  • BDL delivers first indigenous Wire Guided Heavy Weight Torpedo to NSTL.
  • Torpedo features advanced homing, propulsion, and attack capabilities.
  • Achievement boosts India's self-reliance in naval weapon systems.
  • Collaborative effort between DRDO (NSTL) and BDL.
  • Production involves several industrial partners, including MSMEs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Dynamics Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KOVAI] Kovai Medical Board Meeting on May 22, 2026 to Approve Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Kovai Medical Center & Hospital Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these results, as per the company's insider trading code.

  • Kovai Medical's board meeting is scheduled for May 22, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for quarter/year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post-results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOVAI MEDICAL CENTER & HOSPITAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UTLSOLAR] Fujiyama Power Systems Grants 4 Lakh Stock Options
item.description:
Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd. has granted 4,00,000 employee stock options under its ESOP 2023 plan. The grant was approved by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee on April 25, 2026. The options are exercisable into equity shares with a face value of ₹1 each. The exercise price will be determined by the Compensation Committee but will not be less than ₹1 per share. Options vest between 1 to 4 years and must be exercised within 1 year of vesting.

  • Fujiyama Power Systems grants 4,00,000 stock options under ESOP 2023.
  • Exercise price will not be less than ₹1 per share.
  • Options vest between 1 to 4 years from the grant date.
  • Vested options must be exercised within 1 year.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd | Category: ESOP

item.title: [CRYOGENIC] Cryogenic Ogs Ltd Board Meeting on 30 Apr 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
Cryogenic Ogs Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the half-year/financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office.

  • Cryogenic Ogs Ltd board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for period ending March 31, 2026.
  • Meeting will be held at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cryogenic Ogs Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [APLLTD] Alembic Pharma Gets USFDA Nod for Fingolimod Capsules
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Fingolimod Capsules, 0.5 mg. This ANDA is therapeutically equivalent to Novartis' Gilenya Capsules, 0.5 mg. Fingolimod is used to treat relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis. The market size for Fingolimod Capsules, 0.5 mg, is estimated at US$ 145 million for the twelve months ending December 2025, according to IQVIA. Alembic now has a total of 237 ANDA approvals from the USFDA.

  • Alembic receives USFDA final approval for Fingolimod Capsules, 0.5 mg.
  • The approved ANDA is equivalent to Novartis' Gilenya Capsules, 0.5 mg.
  • Fingolimod treats relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis.
  • Fingolimod Capsules have an estimated market size of US$ 145 million.
  • Alembic now has 237 ANDA approvals from USFDA.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALEMBIC PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: USFDA
